profile_summary: Group traveler (mid budget) prioritizing value for money, central location.

recommendations.justification: The Belmont, Seoul ranks #1 for this traveler on value for money (+0.78), central location (+0.91), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay."

supporting_evidence.quote: Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay.
Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.

supporting_evidence.quote: Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Just steps from a beautiful stretch of beach with loungers ready.
Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay.
